title: Viewer QA repairs make page actions visible
summary: Viewer page QA should verify each route by clicking/searching/selecting nodes, not just loading the page. Recent fixes made graph zero result recovery visible, memory selections visibly selected with readable rows, revie
body:
Viewer page QA should verify each route by clicking/searching/selecting nodes, not just loading the page. Recent fixes made graph zero-result recovery visible, memory selections visibly selected with readable rows, review counts use consolidated inbox blockers, data diagnostics expose a real details panel with capped raw rows, risks avoid disabled inert rows, and the 3D import tries relative viewer vendor paths before CDN fallback for GitHub Pages.
Verified by: node --check mcp/viewer/app.js; node --check docs/viewer/app.js; diff -qr mcp/viewer docs/viewer; git diff --check; Playwright desktop/mobile route smoke; npm test --prefix mcp
